scripts.scrape:data:smoke: cd ../.. && PY=${PYTHON:-python3}; BE_SURE_ANCE_DATA_DIR=src/be-sure-ance-app/public/data $PY -m src.scrapers.run_all --only great_eastern,hsbc,singlife && BE_SURE_ANCE_DATA_DIR=src/be-sure-ance-app/public/data $PY -m src.scrapers.moh_institutions && BE_SURE_ANCE_DATA_DIR=src/be-sure-ance-app/public/data $PY -m src.scrapers.lia_claim_turnaround && BE_SURE_ANCE_DATA_DIR=src/be-sure-ance-app/public/data $PY -m src.scrapers.carrier_canonicalization && BE_SURE_ANCE_DATA_DIR=src/be-sure-ance-app/public/data $PY -m src.scrapers.brochure_facts && BE_SURE_ANCE_DATA_DIR=src/be-sure-ance-app/public/data $PY -m src.scrapers.panel_resources --insurers great_eastern,hsbc,singlife --max-plans 3 --request-timeout 5 && BE_SURE_ANCE_DATA_DIR=src/be-sure-ance-app/public/data $PY -m src.scrapers.comparison_facts && $PY -m src.lib.static_app_data --output src/be-sure-ance-app/public/data/app-data.json
scripts.build: npm run build:data && npm run build:app
scripts.build:local: npm run export:data:local && npm run build:app
